title: Bridge Essay: Interoceptive awareness: MBSR training alters information processing of salience

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Form/Meditation** (Phase 7) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Form/Meditation to mechanistic neuroscience through Interoceptive, awareness:, MBSR, training, alters.

**Interoceptive awareness: MBSR training alters information processing of salience network.** — Front Behav Neurosci. PMID: 37025109. DOI: 10.3389/fnbeh.2023.1008086. Mindfulness refers to amental state of awareness of internal experience without judgment. Studies have suggested that each mindfulness practice may involve aunique mental state, but the underlying neurophysiological mechanisms remain unknown. Here we examined how distinct mindfulness practices after mindfulness-based intervention alter brain functionality.
